title: Scoville Expert NEVERSTICK+ 26cm Casserole Dish with Lid, 2.3L, Non Stick Rectangular Oven Dish, Suitable for All Hobs and Ovens, Lightweight Thick Gauge Aluminium, Dishwasher Safe, PFOA Free, Orange
features: 26CM CASSEROLE DISH: The Scoville Expert Neverstick+ 26cm casserole dish with lid is ideal for effortlessly cooking delicious casseroles and stews. Featuring a vibrant orange exterior and sleek graphite grey interior, it's crafted from thick-gauge aluminium for fast, efficient heat distribution.

SUPER STRONG NON-STICK: Equipped with Scoville's award-winning Neverstick+ technology, this oven dish is 6x stronger than other non-sticks, allowing you to cook without oil or butter for healthier meals.
EASY TO CLEAN: Designed for convenience, this casserole dish is dishwasher safe for hassle-free cleaning. For optimal and long-lasting non-stick performance, handwashing is recommended.

VERSATILE HOB COMPATIBILITY: With a reinforced stainless steel base for superior heat conduction, this dish is compatible with all hob types, including gas, electric, and induction. It’s also oven-safe up to 260°C.

LIFETIME GUARANTEE: SCOVILLE provides a lifetime guarantee with this product, covering any manufacturing defects or material issues during normal household use. To register your guarantee and access care instructions, please visit Scoville's website.
